_note: Seed playbook — initialized before Cycle 0. All values are starting assumptions. Update every cycle after analytics pull. Each cycle's data informs the next cycle's decisions.

formatMix._note: No format assumed at start. Populated after first scored entry exists. Updated every cycle from results.jsonl.

_ctaNote: Seed with 2-4 CTA variants for your specific app before Cycle 0. Agent will test and promote winners.
_topicNote: Agent discovers topics through niche research (agent-browser + web search). Do not pre-seed this list — let experiments drive it.
